model.description: Select your Russound RNET device model.
model.title: Device Model

serial.description: Enter the serial connection details for your Russound RNET device.
serial.title: Serial Connection

sources.description: Enter names for the audio sources connected to your Russound system. Leave a source empty to exclude it.
sources.title: Source Names

zones.description: Enter names for each zone. Leave a zone empty to exclude it.
zones.title: Zone Names

tcp.description: Enter the TCP connection details for your Russound RNET device.
tcp.title: TCP Connection

user.description: Select how to connect to your Russound RNET device.
user.title: Connection Type

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Russound RNET device. Check the connection details in your YAML configuration.

model.description: Select your Russound RNET device model to complete the import from YAML configuration.
model.title: Device Model

sources.description: Confirm the audio source names imported from your YAML configuration. Leave a source empty to exclude it.
sources.title: Source Names

zones.description: Confirm the zone names imported from your YAML configuration. Leave a zone empty to exclude it.
zones.title: Zone Names

yaml_import_needed.description: Configuring Russound RNET using YAML is being removed. Additional settings are needed to complete the migration. Click 'Fix' to select your device model and confirm your zones and sources.
yaml_import_needed.title: Russound RNET YAML configuration needs migration

deprecated_yaml.description: Configuring Russound RNET using YAML is being removed. A config entry already exists for this device. Please remove the `russound_rnet` section from your `configuration.yaml` file and restart Home Assistant.
deprecated_yaml.title: Russound RNET YAML configuration should be removed

init.description: Edit names for the audio sources connected to your Russound system.
init.title: Source Names
